hooks._comment: Sync working branch with the remote on session start. Runs inside the worktree (created before the session starts). Syncs the current branch to its own upstream — origin/main for a fresh worktree, else the branch's own remote.
hooks.command: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; out=$(git pull --ff-only 2>&1); printf '{"systemMessage": %s}' "$(printf 'git pull --ff-only:\n%s' "$out" | jq -Rsa .)"
